theme: A Piece of Advice That Changed Your Life

sentences.english: Describe a piece of advice that had a big impact on your life.
sentences.korean: 삶에 큰 영향을 준 조언을 묘사하세요.

sentences.english: The best advice I ever received was from my father who told me to focus on progress not perfection.
sentences.korean: 받은 최고의 조언은 아버지가 완벽이 아닌 발전에 집중하라고 말씀하신 거예요.

sentences.english: Before hearing this I was a perfectionist who would abandon projects the moment they weren't perfect.
sentences.korean: 이걸 듣기 전에는 완벽하지 않으면 프로젝트를 바로 포기하는 완벽주의자였어요.

sentences.english: This advice freed me to start things without the paralyzing fear of making mistakes.
sentences.korean: 이 조언이 실수에 대한 마비시키는 두려움 없이 일을 시작할 수 있도록 해방시켜줬어요.

sentences.english: Now I celebrate small improvements every day and that mindset has helped me achieve far more than perfectionism ever did.
sentences.korean: 이제 매일 작은 발전을 축하하고 그 사고방식이 완벽주의보다 훨씬 더 많은 것을 이루게 해줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Describe a place outside your actual home where yo
A Piece of Advice That Changed Your Life
